reasoning_model_1: The model generates the correct text: 'Welcome everyone! Come in and sit down, make yourselves at home!' model_comparison: Both models successfully incorporate the requested 'enthusiastic' attitude into their delivery. Because Model 2 achieves the target attitude while maintaining superior audio quality and naturalness, it is the clear winner.
